title: Fundamentals Of Shipping
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable supply chain workshop for strengthening fundamentals of shipping practice.
whyThisMatters: Fundamentals Of Shipping helps logistics, shipping, and warehouse teams improve fundamentals of shipping with clearer routines and shared operating language. Participants work through fundamentals of shipping management, Familiarizing the inward and outward cargo flow process, and Introduction to the Carriage of Goods by Sea so daily coordination, documentation, and control become more consistent.
builtFor: Operations, logistics, warehouse, and administration teams
Supervisors responsible for records, stock, or process flow
Employees who coordinate daily operational handovers
walkAwayWith: Understand the key process requirements and operational risks.
Improve accuracy, coordination, and follow-through in daily work.
Apply practical controls to records, movement, storage, or handovers.
Identify improvements that support smoother operations.

modules.title: Familiarizing the inward and outward cargo flow process
Introduction to the Carriage of Goods by Sea

methodologyCaption: Participants work through operational examples and practical exercises that connect process concepts to day-to-day responsibilities.
